description: Radiator upper sight shield / cowl shield

notes:
A basic long block. It features the engine block, pistons, connecting rods, crankshaft, camshaft, and cylinder heads. Other accessories may come seperately:
Intake and Exhaust Manifolds: These usually must be transferred from the old engine.
Engine Electrical & Sensors: Wiring harnesses, fuel injectors, ignition coils, and alternators are normally excluded.Turbocharger: If your vehicle is turbocharged, it does not come with the turbo unless specifically ordered as a long-block variant that includes it.
Fuel System Components: High-pressure fuel pumps and related lines are generally omitted.
Front End Accessories: Water pumps, power steering pumps, A/C compressors, and drive belts.
The engine block, cylinder heads, oil pan, valve covers, timing cover, water pump, and all front-drive accessories (alternator, power steering, A/C compressor, and sometimes the turbocharger)

aliases: pcm, ecu, engine computer, powertrain control module
